About Zora

Where craftsmanship meets timeless elegance

Zora Perfumes is a signature house under The Fourth Company, built around one idea: fragrance should feel as elegant and individual as the person wearing it. Headquartered in Dombivli, Maharashtra, we bring together the craft of traditional perfumery with a more contemporary sense of style.

Every Zora bottle starts with carefully chosen ingredients and scent profiles drawn from fragrance traditions around the world, blended in small batches for genuine longevity and character — never rushed, never generic.

We see fragrance as a quiet form of self-expression — a way of carrying confidence and personality without saying a word. That belief shapes everything we make, from the first blend to the bottle in your hands, as we work toward becoming a name people trust for genuine, lasting quality.

"Zora Perfumes — Where Craftsmanship Meets Timeless Elegance."
ZORAPowered by The Fourth House
